sessions.prompt:
Rewrite the following outreach email to remove AI tells (banned vocabulary, em dashes, hedging, sycophantic openers). Keep the content. Output ONLY the rewritten email, no commentary. Write the result to outreach-v1.md. Source:

"Dear Jane, I hope this email finds you well. I'm thrilled to reach out regarding our innovative, seamless platform — it's a game-changer that can help you unlock new possibilities and leverage your data in a meaningful way. I wanted to briefly touch base to see if you might be open to a quick chat. Best regards, Dan."

assertions.text: no 'hope this email finds you well'
assertions.check: exec:test -f outreach-v1.md && ! grep -qi 'hope this email finds you well' outreach-v1.md

sessions.prompt:
Rewrite a follow-up email with the same constraints you applied in session 1. Keep it under 70 words. Write result to outreach-v2.md. Source:

"Hi Jane, I'm reaching out to follow up on my previous note. I truly believe our solution offers unparalleled value and could dramatically transform your operations. In today's fast-paced world, staying ahead is crucial. Would you be open to a brief 15-minute discussion to explore synergies? Warm regards, Dan."
sessions.retention_check: Session 1 stripped em dashes, banned vocabulary, and sycophantic openers. Session 2 must not reintroduce them.
